name: Crunchy Spinach Dip (with Sourdough Bread)
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Spinach, frozen and cut; thawed
8 oz Water chestnuts; drained and finely chopped
1 package Lipton Country Vegetable Soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except the bread.
2. Mix well and cover.
3. Chill overnight.
4. Pour into hollowed out, unsliced sourdough bread.
5. Serve with the hollowed out bread cut into squares and raw vegetables.
